rule_text: Estimated cost of any AP estate survey not managed by Court of Wards must ordinarily be recovered IN ADVANCE; if the survey is expected to last more than 18 months, the cost may be recovered in instalments per AP Survey and Boundaries Act 1923; if any instalment is not paid, three-month notice of survey-stoppage must be given AND the survey promptly stopped on expiry of three months.
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Article 24(a) read with AP Survey and Boundaries Act 1923
verification_method: Check survey-tender file: advance-payment record OR signed instalment-schedule with 3-month-notice clause
